11. Test case T-10: The HS can accept an audio connection transfer from the AG initiated by a user action on the AG.
12. Test case T-11: The AG can accept an audio connection transfer from the HS initiated by a user action on the HS.
13. Test case T-12: The AG can initiate an audio connection transfer from the HS to the AG.
14. Test case T-13: The HS can initiate an audio connection transfer from the AG to the HS.
15. Test case T-14: The HS can accept an audio connection transfer from the AG initiated by a user action on the HS.
16. Test case T-15: The AG can accept an audio connection transfer from the HS initiated by a user action on the AG.

These test cases cover the requirement for the audio connection transfer from HS to AG. However, it's important to note that the specific implementation details may vary depending on the specific hardware and software used. Always consult the documentation provided by the manufacturer for the most accurate information.

The following is a list of test IDs that cover the requirement for remote audio volume control: T-0, T-1, T-2, T-3, T-4, T-5, T-6, T-7, T-8.

The requirement states that the AG can control the gain of the microphone or speaker of the HS by sending unsolicited result codes +VGM or +VGS respectively. The tests listed below cover this requirement.

Test ID T-0: Verifies that the AG can establish a complete audio connection towards the HS.
Test ID T-1: Verifies that the HS accepts a complete connection establishment initiated from the AG.
Test ID T-2: Verifies that, if supported and provided by the AG, the AG can cause the HS to give an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment initiated from the AG.
Test ID T-3: Verifies that, if supported and provided by the AG, the HS gives an in-band ringing tone during connection establishment initiated from the AG.
Test ID T-4: Verifies that the AG accepts a connection release initiated from the HS.
Test ID T-5: Verifies that the HS accepts an audio connection release initiated on the AG.
Test ID T-6: Verifies that the AG accepts a connection release initiated from the HS.
Test ID T-7: Verifies that the HS accepts an audio connection transfer from the AG to the HS initiated by a user action on the HS.
Test ID T-8: Verifies that the HS accepts an audio connection transfer from the HS to the AG initiated by a user action on the AG.
